title: plectronia dicocca
intro: Plectronia dicocca, also known as Wild Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plectronia dicocca include reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
